action: Connect the authenticated Unicode bundle to Identifier_Status evaluation, Default_Ignorable handling, and confusable-skeleton registration through one fail-closed admission gate.
finding: Exact-version digest authentication must remain in the same construction path as profile and collision evaluation; otherwise verified bytes can be silently replaced before admission decisions are made.
verification: Committed deterministic tests cover six boundaries, but no Node execution was available through the connector, so no passing runtime count is claimed.
limits: The gate does not yet enforce XID syntax, joining-control contexts, script restrictions, or full UTS #39 conformance; authenticated provenance is not claim truth.
handoff: Execute the committed test, then run full Unicode 17.0.0 data with reference-conformance and idempotency checks. Add XID_Start/XID_Continue syntax as a separate explicit gate rather than folding it into Identifier_Status.
hard_boundaries_preserved: No GitHub files or history deleted.
No authentication, eligibility, collision, or intent claim is conflated with another.
